name: OpenEdge database connection / limit errors
description: Database log (.lg) connection, login and resource-limit problems: maximum users/connections reached, connection refused/denied, semaphore or shared-memory exhaustion. Complements the OpenEdge database (.lg) errors preset.
query: file:~".lg" _msg:~"(maximum number of (users|clients|connections)|too many (users|connections)|connect.*(refused|denied|fail)|login by user .* failed|exceeded.*-L|out of free|semaphore|shared memory)"
